Scroll to the past-paper section on this page — we surface real Cambridge questions tagged to 5.5 from our mark-scheme library.

sections.content: Welcome to your **free Business Studies** lesson on **Analysis of accounts** (5.5). This is syllabus point 5.5 on **Paper 2 (Case Study)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for Analysis of accounts

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 7115 rewards answers tied to the case business — name the firm, quote stimulus data, and balance advantages against disadvantages. On Paper 2 (Case Study), Analysis of accounts often appears as part of a longer structured or case question.
